prompt.goal: Details: Tutor Open chưa apply → nút Apply; đã apply → "Đã apply"; Owner → link ForJob; Delete job chặn nếu có Applications.
prompt.scope: - JobDetailViewModel CanApply / AlreadyApplied - Details.cshtml buttons - Delete check Applications.Any
prompt.acceptanceCriteria: - [ ] Nút Apply đúng state - [ ] Delete job có apply → lỗi - [ ] build pass
prompt.testPlan: 1. Tutor Details → Apply 2. Reload → Đã apply 3. Owner delete job đã apply → fail
